{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320150700D9356794CBCFE981E7CA"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7551852632208229145","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我开的第一本长篇传统玄幻小说，前面的剧情文笔的确有很多不足，我会慢慢改善的。后面的剧情，文笔以及内容都会慢慢精彩，希望各位看官能有耐心看下去，给点支持和鼓励，免费的催更点一点。[送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758308269,"group_id":"7545069530855246872","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4143374803667479"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545069530855246872","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"160"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10958,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7549256517251318553","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书友们，处女作来啦，请各位大佬批评指正！这本书是为了完成年少时欠下自己的一场梦！前期剧情慢世界观大，有点无厘头，但是后面会解释清楚。个人感觉后续故事精彩纷呈，希望大家能喜欢！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757702506,"group_id":"7545069530855246872","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"他们总说风能够带走一切，于是我打算做一个追风的傻子。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9BZTsDNS5IhosZDhhmeQQC2mfVXagnegM+EVVoiWf4b","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4f3c03d612fd4d219c3837dd8d4a25ee~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534567&x-signature=SDvlwpHnhYim3Gv2G1GH%2BMqLoWo%3D","user_id":"4143374803667479","user_name":"听风又眠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4143374803667479","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545069530855246872","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+多女主+无系统+成长+搞笑＋白手起家】
李风眠刚从白血病里解脱，转头穿越成剑族少族长？

开局差点被陨石砸成英雄碎片?还没开始享受富二代生活就被迫流浪?


别人穿越带系统、开后宫，自己天崩开局，从一把剑白手起家，主打一个 “倒霉开局天花板”！

好不容易流浪五年，没想到被骗合欢宗。差点把自己 “打包” 当炉鼎，给女修送经验。

没金手指？没系统?那就攥紧铁剑硬砍！

从妖兽堆抢功法，在剑宗啃最厚秘籍，剑气劈翻草原魔族，踏平樊国一统十三州。

“什么?冥女对我一见钟情！要抓我当压寨夫君?”


我只能边跑边骂：“修武界能不能对老实人友好点？”

既然躲不开这大势洪流，那么不好意思，功法，丹药，武技，宝物通通交出来！公主，圣女，兽娘，师傅通通往我怀里送！

“问我练多久成剑帝？”

“从‘修武界倒霉蛋练习生’到剑帝，也就一坤年起步！”

【无系统纯硬砍！】开局逃亡被骗合欢宗，冥女逼婚、始皇当 BOSS，这修武界规则全被他砍碎！

点击看倒霉蛋少族长，把地狱开局砍成剑帝传奇！
